01 — About the Event

ABOUT 808 NIGHTS

808 NIGHTS Vol. 1 is a premium entertainment experience designed to bring together music, youth culture, live performances, and immersive crowd energy under one unforgettable atmosphere. Organized by OnStage Nepal, the event delivers a professionally managed experience featuring live music, rap culture, DJ energy, and modern event production.

01
Opening Dance Performances

04
Main Rap Performance by Yabi The Goat
05
DJ & Club Afterparty Experience
06
Audience Engagement & Interactive Entertainment

03 — Performers

MAIN ARTISTS

Main Headline Act — Rap / Hip-Hop
YABI THE GOAT

One of the fastest-rising names in Nepal's modern rap scene. Known for blending hip-hop culture with catchy hooks and crowd-driven stage energy — with a viral music catalog spanning tens of millions of streams.

Total Streams
11M+
Boomerang11 Million+ plays on YouTube
CHEATER ft. KAVI GMillions of streams — 2026
Maya JalaimaTens of millions across platforms
Laal Gaadi & VagwanDefining hits in Nepali rap
Live Band — Indie Rock / Alternative
TH3 URJA

An emerging Nepalese indie-rock collective gaining rapid popularity through expressive vocals, clean guitar melodies, and emotionally resonant songwriting. Known for high-energy sets at youth events including Otaku Jatra.

Genre
Indie Rock
AAIDEUOriginal release
UDNA DEUOriginal release
Eutai PrashnaOriginal release
